texto: Internalizing problem-solving techniques enhances the neural activity that allows you to more easily hear the whispers of your growing intuition. When you know—really know—how to solve a problem just by looking at it, you’ve created a commanding chunk that sweeps like a song through your mind.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Barbara Oakley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Internalizing problem-solving techniques enhances the neural activity that allows you to more eas…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, cognition, intuition pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de intuition e learning.
